blocks.title: Our craft
paragraphs: Bottega Nova has hand-cut and stitched leather goods in Florence since 1978. Every piece in this collection is made to order by a team of six artisans, using vegetable-tanned leather sourced from a single tannery we have worked with for three generations.
This season pairs our classic silhouettes with a new chestnut-brown tanning batch, available while stock lasts.

products.name: Marina Tote
products.description: Full-grain leather tote with a reinforced base and brass hardware.

products.name: Ponte Crossbody
products.description: Compact crossbody bag in soft nappa leather with an adjustable strap.

products.name: Duomo Backpack
products.description: Structured leather backpack with a padded laptop sleeve.

products.name: Arno Belt
products.description: Reversible belt in chestnut and black, hand-stitched edges.

products.name: Vespucci Wallet
products.description: Slim bifold wallet with six card slots and a coin pocket.

products.name: Fiesole Weekender
products.description: Soft-sided weekend bag with a detachable shoulder strap.

blocks.heading: Orders & contact
lines: Retail: online store + our Florence atelier by appointment
